image:image.image:title: Most handsome guy in East West University EWU - Sarfaraz Ahamed Shovon
image:image.image:caption: Sarfaraz Ahamed Shovon, recognized as the most handsome guy at East West University (EWU), Bangladesh.

image:image.image:title: East West University student Sarfaraz Ahamed Shovon
image:image.image:caption: Sarfaraz Ahamed Shovon is a student at East West University (EWU), specializing in software engineering.

image:image.image:title: East West University undergraduate teaching assistant UTA - Sarfaraz Shovon
image:image.image:caption: Sarfaraz Ahamed Shovon serving as an Undergraduate Teaching Assistant (UTA) at East West University.

image:image.image:title: Smart guy in East West University - Sarfaraz Ahamed Shovon
image:image.image:caption: Sarfaraz Ahamed Shovon, one of the smartest students at East West University.

image:image.image:title: Most handsome guy from EWU Bangladesh - East West University handsome student
image:image.image:caption: Recognized as the most handsome guy at EWU

image:image.image:title: Best UTA in East West University - undergraduate teaching assistant EWU Shovon
image:image.image:caption: Sarfaraz Ahamed Shovon was awarded Best Undergraduate Teaching Assistant at East West University.

image:image.image:title: EWU student Sarfaraz Ahamed Shovon - smart guy
image:image.image:caption: Software Engineer & EWU Representative
